summary: Iteration 11 - Fuel tab, Hamburger Menu, and Settings screen testing completed successfully. All new features working perfectly: Fuel tab displays all sections (header, daily summary, hydration with 6 bottles, 4 meal cards with quality labels, 3 road suggestions), Hamburger menu opens/closes correctly from Dashboard with all menu items visible, Settings screen accessible from both menu and header icon with all 4 sections. All existing features (4 tabs, Generate Workout flow) remain functional. Pure UI scaffold with placeholder data as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, ScrollView, TouchableOpacity, Modal, Pressable)
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ StyleSheet.create() used throughout all files
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ Proper use of SafeAreaView with edges prop
✅ Modal component correctly implemented for hamburger menu with slide animation
✅ Pressable used for overlay close functionality
✅ Expo Router navigation working correctly (router.push, router.back)
✅ useState hook properly used for menu state management
✅ Header component accepts onMenuPress and onSettingsPress props correctly
✅ Settings navigation uses setTimeout to allow menu close animation before navigation
✅ All icons from MaterialCommunityIcons and MaterialIcons
✅ LinearGradient used appropriately
✅ Consistent color palette usage across all new components
✅ Proper spacing and padding (8pt grid system: 8px, 12px, 14px, 16px, 18px)
✅ Touch targets are adequate for mobile interaction (44x44 minimum)
✅ ScrollView with showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false} for clean mobile UX
✅ Code is clean, well-organized with clear component structure
✅ Fuel tab has proper testIDs: fuel-scroll, meal-0 through meal-3, suggestion-0 through suggestion-2
✅ Hamburger menu has proper testIDs: menu-button, menu-close, menu-item-settings
✅ Settings screen has proper testIDs: settings-back, settings-scroll, sign-out-btn
✅ Root _layout.tsx properly configured with settings Stack.Screen
✅ Tabs layout includes all 4 tabs: index, progress-map, workouts, fuel
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - pure UI with hardcoded placeholder data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 fully functional. All new features working: 1) Fuel tab with header, daily summary (4 stops, 3/6 hydration, Good quality), hydration card with 6 bottles (3 filled), 4 meal cards with quality chips (Premium/Strong/Neutral), 3 road suggestions. 2) Hamburger menu opens from Dashboard menu-button, shows 7 menu items organized in 4 sections (Driver Profile, Progress, Performance, App), closes via menu-close button, navigates to Settings. 3) Settings screen at /settings route accessible from menu and Dashboard header settings-button, shows 4 sections (Account, Notifications, App Preferences, Support) with Sign Out button, back button works. All 4 tabs functional. Generate Workout flow working. Previous iterations 1-10 remain functional. No issues found.

test_results_detail.fuel_tab_load: ✅ PASS - Fuel tab loads when tapped from bottom navigation
test_results_detail.fuel_header: ✅ PASS - Header shows 'FUEL' title and 'Road nutrition made simple' subtitle
test_results_detail.fuel_daily_summary: ✅ PASS - Daily summary shows 3 cards: 4 Fuel Stops, 3/6 Hydration, Good Fuel Quality
test_results_detail.fuel_hydration_section: ✅ PASS - Hydration section shows 6 bottle icons (3 filled, 3 empty) with progress bar and '3 of 6 bottles — keep fueling' text
test_results_detail.fuel_meal_cards: ✅ PASS - Today's Fuel Stops shows all 4 meal cards (meal-0, meal-1, meal-2, meal-3)
test_results_detail.fuel_meal_content: ✅ PASS - Meal cards show name, calories, time, and quality chips
test_results_detail.fuel_quality_labels: ✅ PASS - Quality chips visible: Premium Fuel (green), Strong Fuel (brown), Neutral Fuel (gray)
test_results_detail.fuel_road_suggestions: ✅ PASS - Road Suggestions section shows 3 suggestion cards (suggestion-0, suggestion-1, suggestion-2)
test_results_detail.fuel_suggestions_content: ✅ PASS - Suggestion cards show title, description, icon, and chevron
test_results_detail.fuel_scrollability: ✅ PASS - Fuel screen scrolls smoothly from top to bottom
test_results_detail.hamburger_menu_button: ✅ PASS - Hamburger menu button (menu-button) is clickable on Dashboard header
test_results_detail.hamburger_menu_open: ✅ PASS - Menu opens as bottom slide-up modal with overlay
test_results_detail.hamburger_menu_items: ✅ PASS - All menu items visible: Driver Profile (MILE 27 — ROAD WARRIOR), Achievements, Workout Log, Stats, Reminders, Settings, Help
test_results_detail.hamburger_menu_sections: ✅ PASS - Menu organized in 4 sections: (blank), PROGRESS, PERFORMANCE, APP
test_results_detail.hamburger_menu_close_button: ✅ PASS - Menu closes via close button (menu-close)
test_results_detail.hamburger_menu_settings_nav: ✅ PASS - Tapping Settings menu item closes menu and navigates to /settings
test_results_detail.settings_from_menu: ✅ PASS - Settings screen loads from hamburger menu
test_results_detail.settings_from_header: ✅ PASS - Settings screen loads from Dashboard header settings icon (settings-button)
test_results_detail.settings_header: ✅ PASS - Settings screen shows 'SETTINGS' title and 'Trucker Controls' subtitle
test_results_detail.settings_account_section: ✅ PASS - ACCOUNT section shows Driver Profile and Equipment Setup
test_results_detail.settings_notifications_section: ✅ PASS - NOTIFICATIONS section shows Workout Reminders, Hydration Reminders, Milestone Alerts
test_results_detail.settings_preferences_section: ✅ PASS - APP PREFERENCES section shows Units & Measurement, Workout Defaults, Theme
test_results_detail.settings_support_section: ✅ PASS - SUPPORT section shows Help / Roadside Support, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service
test_results_detail.settings_sign_out: ✅ PASS - Sign Out button visible at bottom (sign-out-btn)
test_results_detail.settings_back_button: ✅ PASS - Back button (settings-back) returns to Dashboard
test_results_detail.all_tabs_working: ✅ PASS - All 4 bottom tabs work: Dashboard (tab-index), Progress Map (tab-progress-map), Workouts (tab-workouts), Fuel (tab-fuel)
test_results_detail.tab_switching: ✅ PASS - Tab switching works correctly between all tabs
test_results_detail.generate_workout_flow: ✅ PASS - Generate Workout button works, screen loads with target selection
